name: autowhisper
description: Never make marketing content again. Hand AutoWhisper's AI CMO one product and it runs itself — learning what you sell, watching what your rivals post, and making content that doesn't look like an ad, in every language, on every channel you've connected.
author: AutoWhisper

skills.name: autowhisper
skills.description: Hand the whole content job to AutoWhisper's AI CMO from your agent: add a product, and it generates, approves, schedules, and publishes on-brand content that doesn't look like an ad — in every language, on every channel.
